## 🔒 Lock-End @VERSION@

**Requirements:** Paper 26.1.2+, Java 25

### Download

Download `lock-end-@VERSION@.jar` below and place it in your server's `plugins/` folder.

### Commands

| Command | Description |
| ------- | ----------- |
| `/endlock` | Toggle End lock |
| `/lock` | Alias |
| `/endlock status` | Show status (no permission) |

### Links

- [README](https://github.com/vwtfafa/lock-end/blob/master/README.md)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lock-end) *(if published)*
